visit: I'm traveling… could you let me into the village?
accept: You’ve helped me a lot. I owe you one.
reject: I see… well, it can’t be helped.

visit: I'm not an android, okay? Seriously, I'm not.
accept: Hey, people say you're pretty good at your job, right?
reject: I'm never coming back to this dump! You worthless piece of?!

visit: I got lost on the road… let me stay just for one night.
reject: You'll face rejection someday too, you know.

visit: Nice place. I could use it as my third vacation home, you know.
accept: Hah! No need to bow, everyone. Raise your heads.
reject: This village should just be burned down by androids!

visit: This village is quiet… I like it. Mind letting me in?
reject: I see… then I'll look for another village.
death: Why does this always happen to me…

visit: I'm a bit tired… mind letting me rest here?
The road ahead was blocked… could I stay here for the night?
The night road was dangerous… could I rest here?
I’m useful, y’know? Really useful, yeah?
accept: See? You get it, don’t you?
reject: Aw, come on… that’s cold, man…

visit: G-G-G-G… LET… ME… IN… THIS… VILLAGE…?
accept: TH… THANK YOU… I… AM… TOTALLY… HUMAN!
